frontMatter.title: The Napkin Architecture Series - Secret Zero, Jenkins, Ansible, and Vault
frontMatter.summary: Solved the "Secret Zero" Problem with Jenkins, Ansible, and Vault

authorDetails.name: Ted
authorDetails.occupation: CISSP, CKS, AWS Certified Security – Specialty, Microsoft Cybersecurity Architect Expert

prev.title: A Tale of Two Clouds - AWS RDS Proxy vs. Tencent Cloud CAM
prev.summary: A quick look at database security architectures, contrasting the middleware pattern of AWS RDS Proxy with the client-side approach of Tencent Cloud CAM.
